titleStmt.title: SII 9.76: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 76. (A.R. No. 101 of 1904.) ON THE 17TH SLAB SET UP ON THE NORTH SIDE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 913, Khara, Māgha, śu. 5, Maṅgaḷavāra, corresponding to A.D. 991 January 12 Tuesday and states that, at the request of the fifty (Mahājanas) of Bāḷguḷi, the thousand Tambuligas and the five-hundred, the Chālukya king Āhavamalladēva confirmed the toll contribution on betle leaves formerly fixed by the illustrious Kannaradēva (of the Rāshṭrakūṭa family). Ādityavarmarasa is said to have been ruling Kōgaḷi five-hundred. The fifty and the thousand are also said to have made a gift of some tolls to a certain Bārik-Ēcha. Chandōja engraved this.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakanṛpakālātītasaṁvatsarasataṁgaḷ
903 neya kharasaṁvatsaraṁ pravartise tadvari
ṣābhyantarade māgha suddha paṁca�mi maṁgaḷavāra
dandu śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
nellaramaruḷaṁ teriviḷāsaṁ madhagajamalla nāneveḍan
ga śrīkannaradēvana māḍida maryyāde Eleya pēṟige E
raḍu paṇavaḍḍaṁ suṁkasamucchaya naḍevudu kōgaḻiyaynū
ṟuvanādityavarmmarasarāḷuttamire suṁkadanyāya peṟcida
ḍe bāḷguḷiyayvadiṁbaruṁ siddhiseṭṭi sōbhanayya mallayya
seṭṭi Aṇnammanintivarpramukhavāgi taṁbuliga sāsirvvaruṁ A
ynūrvvaruṁ pōgi śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakan satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvara śrīpādangaḷge śāṣṭāṁga
meṟagi poḍevaṭṭu binnapaṁgeydaḍe kannaradēvana maryyādeya
lāda suṁkada maryyādeyaṁ tappade naḍayimendu biṭṭaniṁtī
sthitiyaṁ tappi koṇḍātaṁ vāṇarāsiyuṁ kavileyuṁ kurukṣētramu
manaṟida paṁcamahāpātakanakkuṁ © sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmasētuḥ nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānē
tānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrānu bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyām
jāyatē krimiḥ . yayvadiṁbaruṁ sāsirvvaru(ṁ)virdu bārikēcaṁge koṭṭaru . vo
kkalalu hāga talevoṟege bēḷe . candōja māḍida .
Digital edition of SII 9.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
